title: Renewable Mega Showdown Items
description: Makes certain items from "Cobblemon: Mega Showdown" able to be duplicated similarly to vanilla armour trims
body:
This datapack was created because running Cobblemon: Mega Showdown on a multiplayer server usually requires every player to find extremely rare structures which can be quite tedious and make battles feel unfair on those who do not have said items.

This datapack takes the concept of duplicating armour trims in vanilla minecraft, and extends that functionality to these battle gimmick items via custom crafting recipes.
(It also allows uncrafting certain items into their core component, for example a mega bracelet can be crafted back into a keystone)

The idea is that, once one player finds one of these rare items, they can share it with others to duplicate, the same way players often do with armour trims or netherite upgrades.
